---
title: "log_drainage_area"
author: "Avital Breverman"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

# Computes a time separation criterion, in days, between events in a PDS to ensure independence
# U.S. Water Resources Council, 1976
# DA drainage area in square miles
# Returns days between events
B17_days_between <- function(DA) {
  ceiling(5 + log(DA))
}
```

```{r}
DA <- exp(0:13) # Natural log spacing
t <- B17_days_between(DA) # Days between, t

DA_t <- tibble(DA = DA,
               t = t,
               exp_label = paste0("e^", round(log(DA), 2)))
```

```{r}
ggplot(DA_t, aes(x = DA, y = t)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_text(aes(label = exp_label), parse = TRUE, hjust = 1.5) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_comma()) +
  xlab("Drainage Area (square miles)") +
  ylab("Days Between Peaks") +
  ylim(0, 20) +
  theme_bw()
```
